Dataset_1_Standard.sql: SELECT purchase_category, SUM(purchase_amount::NUMERIC) AS total_value FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY purchase_category ORDER BY total_value DESC;
SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN LOWER(TRIM(discount_used::TEXT)) IN ('yes', 'true', '1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0) AS percentage_share FROM ecommerce_behavior;

Dataset_2_Alt_Names.sql: SELECT product_type, SUM(total_price::NUMERIC) AS total_value FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY product_type ORDER BY total_value DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_count FROM ecommerce_behavior WHERE LOWER(TRIM(discount_flag::TEXT)) IN ('yes', 'true', '1');

Dataset_3_Education.sql: SELECT subject, AVG(exam_score::NUMERIC) AS total_value FROM ecommerce_behavior GROUP BY subject ORDER BY total_value DESC;
SELECT SUM(exam_score::NUMERIC) AS total_value FROM ecommerce_behavior;
